subject: Q2 estimated taxes — due June 16
snippet: Merrill, attaching the Q2 estimate for Bellwood Holdings LLC. The voucher and the payment link are inside. Let me know if the rental income figure looks right.
body:
Merrill,

Attaching the Q2 estimated tax voucher for Bellwood Holdings LLC. Based on the year-to-date rental income and the consulting receipts you sent over, the estimate is $4,180. I included the EFTPS payment link.

Please confirm the rental income figure on line 3 matches your records before you submit.

Best,
Dana Whitfield, CPA

subject: Tenant renewal — 1420 Linden Unit 2
snippet: The tenant in Unit 2 wants to renew for 12 months. Proposed rent is $1,475/mo. Do you approve, or would you like to adjust before we send the lease?
body:
Hi Merrill,

The tenant in Unit 2 at 1420 Linden has asked to renew for another 12 months. We're recommending $1,475/mo (a 3% increase). They've paid on time all year.

Reply 'approve' and we'll send the renewal lease for e-signature.

Thanks,
Riverside Property Management

subject: Proposal draft for the Oakbrook engagement
snippet: Attached is the v2 proposal for the Oakbrook strategy engagement. I moved the kickoff to mid-July and adjusted the fee to the scope we discussed. Want to review before I send it Friday?
body:
Merrill,

v2 of the Oakbrook proposal is attached. Changes from v1:
- Kickoff pushed to the week of July 13
- Fee adjusted to $18,000 fixed for the 6-week scope
- Added the data-room access clause you flagged

If it looks good I'll send to the client Friday morning.

Hector

subject: Your June statement is ready
snippet: The June statement for your Bellwood Holdings LLC business checking (…4471) is now available. Ending balance and recent transactions are in your account.
body:
Your monthly statement is ready.

Account: Bellwood Holdings LLC Business Complete Checking (…4471)
Statement period: May 26 – June 25, 2026

Sign in to view your ending balance and transactions. This is an automated message; please do not reply.

subject: Invoice #2041 was paid
snippet: Good news — invoice #2041 to Oakbrook Partners for $6,000 was paid in full. Funds will deposit in 1–2 business days.
body:
Invoice #2041 has been paid.

Customer: Oakbrook Partners
Amount: $6,000.00
Status: Paid in full

Deposits typically arrive within 1–2 business days.

subject: Landlord policy renewal — 1420 Linden
snippet: Your landlord policy on the Linden duplex renews July 1. Premium is steady at $1,840/yr. I can bind it today — just reply to confirm the coverage limits are unchanged.
body:
Hi Merrill,

Your landlord/dwelling policy on 1420 Linden renews July 1. The premium holds at $1,840/year with the same $500K liability limit.

Reply to confirm and I'll bind it. If you've made any improvements to the property, let me know so we can update the replacement cost.

Laura Beck, State Farm

subject: Re: kickoff logistics
snippet: Thanks Merrill. The week of July 13 works on our end. Can you send the engagement letter and the W-9 so procurement can set you up as a vendor?
body:
Merrill,

The week of July 13 works for us. To get you into our system, our procurement team needs:
- The signed engagement letter
- A W-9 for Bellwood Holdings LLC

Once those are in we'll issue the PO. Looking forward to it.

J. Mueller
Oakbrook Partners

subject: Estimate: gutter + soffit repair, Linden duplex
snippet: Estimate attached for the gutter and soffit work at 1420 Linden — $2,650, about two days of work. We can start the week of July 6 if you approve.
body:
Mr. Bellwood,

Thanks for having us out. The estimate for the gutter replacement and soffit repair at 1420 Linden is $2,650, roughly two days of work. That includes hauling the old material.

We have an opening the week of July 6. Reply to approve and we'll get you on the schedule.

Sal's Roofing & Exteriors

subject: Annual report reminder — Bellwood Holdings LLC
snippet: Illinois requires your LLC annual report by the end of the registration anniversary month. We can file it for you for $99 plus the state fee. No action needed if you've already filed.
body:
Reminder: Illinois LLC Annual Report

Bellwood Holdings LLC's annual report is due by the end of your anniversary month to keep the LLC in good standing. We can prepare and file it for $99 plus the $75 state fee.

If you've already filed directly with the Secretary of State, disregard this notice.

subject: Hector shared 'Oakbrook — data room' with you
snippet: Hector Ramos shared a folder. It contains the engagement letter, the W-9, and the v2 proposal. Click to open in Dropbox.
body:
Hector Ramos (hector@ramos-consulting.com) shared the folder 'Oakbrook — data room' with you.

Contents: engagement-letter.pdf, W9-BellwoodHoldings.pdf, proposal-v2.pdf

Open in Dropbox to view. You can comment directly on the files.

subject: Kitchen faucet is leaking
snippet: Hi Merrill — the kitchen faucet started dripping pretty badly this week and the cabinet underneath is getting wet. Could you send someone to look at it? Happy to be home this weekend.
body:
Hi Merrill,

The kitchen faucet has started dripping badly over the last few days and the cabinet base underneath is getting wet. I put a towel down for now.

Could you send a plumber? I can be home Saturday or Sunday any time.

Thanks,
Priya (Unit 2)

subject: Your subscription renews in 5 days
snippet: Your Email Marketing plan ($45/mo) renews on July 1. No action needed to continue. Update your card or cancel anytime from billing settings.
body:
Your Constant Contact subscription renews soon.

Plan: Email Marketing — Standard ($45/month)
Renews: July 1, 2026

No action is needed to keep your account active. You can update payment or cancel from your billing settings.

subject: Off-market duplex on 22nd — worth a look?
snippet: Merrill, a 2-flat on 22nd is coming off-market before it lists. Numbers pencil out around a 7.5% cap. I can get you in this week if you're interested in adding to the portfolio.
body:
Merrill,

A well-kept 2-flat on 22nd is about to come available off-market. Asking is $289K; at market rents it pencils to roughly a 7.5% cap. Tenants in place, both current.

Want me to set up a private showing this week before it hits the MLS?

Marcus Webb, Webb Realty

subject: Keep business + village email separate
snippet: Quick note: please keep the LLC and rental correspondence on this personal address, not your village account. It keeps the books clean and avoids tangling private business with public records.
body:
Merrill,

Friendly reminder from your accountant: route anything about Bellwood Holdings, the rentals, or the consulting through this personal email — not the village address.

It keeps the business books clean at tax time and, just as important, keeps your private business out of anything that could become a public record. Happy to explain more if useful.

Dana
